markdown.markdown:
Use this dashboard as a self-auditing summary to assess the structural completeness, governance readiness, AI disclosure status, and reproducibility of your research project.

---

## 1. Project Overview Status

| Component | Status | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Research question clearly defined** | ☐ | > REPLACE THIS: Add notes here |
| **Dataset described** | ☐ | > REPLACE THIS: Add notes here |
| **Methods documented** | ☐ | > REPLACE THIS: Add notes here |
| **Results interpreted** | ☐ | > REPLACE THIS: Add notes here |
| **Limitations stated** | ☐ | > REPLACE THIS: Add notes here |

---

## 2. Governance Completion

::: {.callout-note}
These artefacts strengthen research transparency and defensibility.
:::

- [ ] Dataset Card completed
- [ ] Model Card completed
- [ ] Risk Register filled
- [ ] Decision Log updated
- [ ] Reproducibility Checklist completed

---

## 3. AI Disclosure & Reflection

::: {.callout-note}
AI use is **optional**. Whether used or not, human responsibility remains primary. Transparency ensures rigorous research standards.
:::

- [ ] AI tools used? (Yes / No / Not Applicable)
- [ ] AI Capability Checkpoints completed
- [ ] AI use documented in Decision Log
- [ ] No sensitive data shared with AI tools
- [ ] Human verification explicitly documented

---

## 4. Reproducibility Readiness

::: {.callout-note}
A reproducible project ensures portability, transparency, and trust in the scientific method.
:::

- [ ] Data dictionary completed
- [ ] Codebook available
- [ ] Synthetic vs real data clearly stated
- [ ] Dependencies documented
- [ ] Version control in use
- [ ] Citation file included

---

## 5. Summary Readiness Indicator

Use the following visual guide to interpret your total incomplete items across all checklists above.

> **0–5 incomplete items** → Research Ready for Internal Review
> 
> **6–10 incomplete items** → Requires Governance Review
> 
> **>10 incomplete items** → Early Draft Stage
